nodes.name: expand.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for the batch Expand executor, measuring throughput of duplicating rows with different repeat counts.

nodes.name: filter.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for the batch Filter executor, measuring row filtering throughput across different predicate selectivities.

nodes.name: hash_agg.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for the batch HashAgg executor, measuring grouping and aggregation throughput with various group-key cardinalities.

nodes.name: hash_join.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for the batch HashJoin executor, measuring join throughput for inner joins with varying build/probe side sizes.

nodes.name: limit.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for the batch Limit executor, measuring the cost of truncating result sets to N rows.

nodes.name: nested_loop_join.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for the batch NestedLoopJoin executor, measuring cross-join and filtered join performance.

nodes.name: sort.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for the batch Sort executor, measuring sort throughput across different chunk sizes and key types.

nodes.name: top_n.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for the batch TopN executor, measuring heap-based top-k selection performance.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Shared benchmark utilities for batch executor benchmarks: data generation, executor setup, and common benchmark harness helpers.
